scene_title: Chip neural Neuralink em palma envelhecida
narrative_beat: Microchip dourado e prata sobre pele humana

style_reference.textual_description: dark cinematic chiaroscuro, Caravaggio-inspired, foreground in rich warm tones (crimson, amber, gold) with background in desaturated black-and-white, film grain, candlelight, floating orange embers

subject.primary: colorful vivid Neuralink-style neural microchip in luminous gold and silver with detailed visible circuits and golden connectors resting on aged human palm in vibrant foreground
subject.focal_point: the luminous gold and silver chip with detailed visible circuits
subject.secondary: black and white desaturated neuroscience laboratory with microscopes and dark screens in background
props: Neuralink neural microchip in gold and silver

mood.emotion: the mark on the forehead — Neuralink as prophetic precedent

symbolism.primary: silicon entering the skull — the mark in literal form
symbolism.secondary: aged palm as human mortality surrendering to artificial permanence

negative_as_positive: clean frame without visible text or watermarks
muted desaturated background palette warm saturated foreground only

multimodal_inputs.instruction: Transfer color palette, lighting, grain, atmosphere only. Do not copy composition.
